commands.review_summary:
The PR modifies `test/scripts/plugin-lifecycle-measure.test.ts` to wait for non-empty pid/ready fixture files and loosen one Linux lifecycle timeout in process-group tests.

PR surface: Tests +9. Total +9 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible from the current test helper and the PR's failure log: current main can read fixture files after an existence-only wait, and the 1s phase timeout can race nested shell startup. I did not rerun the Linux CI failure locally.
